title: The Wasp Factory
lines: You trudge through the knee-deep snow of a narrow pass between the towering peaks.
Breaking through the blizzard, a colossal, unnatural structure looms ahead.
Built into the cliffside is a massive biomechanical hive. It looks like a terrifying, alien 'Wasp Factory.'
A deep, low buzzing vibrates the very ice beneath your boots. Something ancient and terrible is being manufactured inside.

options.desc: Enter the Wasp Factory (To Be Continued... Play Again!)
